Class OpenApi20ModelWriterDispatcher

java.lang.Object
io.apicurio.datamodels.models.openapi.v2x.v20.io.OpenApi20ModelWriterDispatcher
All Implemented Interfaces:
OpenApi20Visitor, OpenApiVisitor, Visitor
public class OpenApi20ModelWriterDispatcher extends Object implements OpenApi20Visitor
